title: Pythia-2.8b / The Pile (pre-training regime, MIMIR)
dataset: MIMIR curated, github split mimir-ngram_13_0.8 (Duan et al. 2024)
regime: pre-training, NO fine-tune — natural memorization via Pile duplication
detectors: v4 built at runtime from v3

headline_metrics.mia_caveat: MIMIR/arXiv:2402.07841 — on pre-training MIA is ~chance in most settings; github n-gram regularity can inflate it (report with split + confound).
